title: Better Career Mod
tag_line: Open-world career without tutorials or restrictions - start in an empty garage and progress realistically
message:
[CENTER][SIZE=5][B]Better Career Mod v0.3.6[/B][/SIZE]
[I]A realistic open-world career experience[/I][/CENTER]

[CENTER][SIZE=4][B]CORE FEATURES[/B][/SIZE][/CENTER]
[LIST]
[*][B]Banking & Credit[/B] - Multi-account system with FICO-inspired credit scoring (300-850)
[*][B]Vehicle Marketplace[/B] - 50+ curated listings with 9 seller archetypes and realistic negotiation
[*][B]10 Brand Dealerships[/B] - Each with their own website, catalog, and purchase flow
[*][B]PlanEx Courier[/B] - 20-level delivery dispatch with loaner vehicles, route optimization, and special routes
[*][B]Police & Pursuits[/B] - 3-level escalation with interceptors, spike strips, and persistent heat
[*][B]O'Really Auto Parts[/B] - Browse, preview, and purchase parts with 3 delivery options
[*][B]Paint Shop[/B] - 3-tier garage system: curated palette, per-part painting, full RGB + finishes
[*][B]Dynamic Weather[/B] - Seasonal weather with road surface effects and traffic impact
[*][B]Time System[/B] - Full 365-day calendar with day/night cycle and configurable speed
[*][B]Loans & Mortgages[/B] - 4 lenders, auto-payments, repossession system
[*][B]Real Estate[/B] - Property purchasing with taxes and garage tiers
[*][B]7-Step Tutorial[/B] - Guided introduction for new players
[/LIST]

[CENTER][SIZE=4][B]THE EXPERIENCE[/B][/SIZE][/CENTER]
[LIST]
[*][B]Windows XP Desktop[/B] - IE6 browser with 14+ themed websites
[*][B]iPhone-style Phone[/B] - 15+ apps for banking, delivery, marketplace, and more
[*][B]Outlook Express Email[/B] - System notifications, spam engine, event-driven messages
[*][B]iMessage Chat[/B] - NPC conversations for negotiation and police alerts
[*][B]Clippy Assistant[/B] - FAQ and contextual tips
[*][B]Bilingual[/B] - Full English and Spanish support
[/LIST]

[CENTER][SIZE=3][B]REQUIREMENTS[/B][/SIZE][/CENTER]
[LIST]
[*]BeamNG.drive 0.38+
[*]West Coast USA map (primary), Italy (in development)
[*]Not compatible with other career overhaul mods
[/LIST]

[CENTER][SIZE=3][B]LINKS[/B][/SIZE]
[URL=https://github.com/thingsbyjosh/better_career_mod/wiki]Wiki Documentation[/URL]
[URL=https://github.com/thingsbyjosh/better_career_mod]GitHub Repository[/URL][/CENTER]
